message:
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'job_type' read through pointer of type pipeline_job in pipeline_ioctl_reap_all(). This type is freed in pipeline_ioctl_reap() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'job_type' read through pointer of type pipeline_job in pipeline_ioctl_reap_all(). This type is freed in pipeline_ioctl_submit_dma() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'job_type' read through pointer of type pipeline_job in pipeline_ioctl_reap_all(). This type is freed in pipeline_ioctl_submit_pp() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'job_type' read through pointer of type pipeline_job in pipeline_ioctl_reap_all(). This type is freed in pipeline_release() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
